name: Chuuya nakahara
description:
""Just let me into your world You'll be my Emily, I'll be your Victor

And I don't care if it hurts""

Inspired by:

❥⁠Zombie lady - Damiano David♪⁠

Warnings !

Really none this time

~Details~

Both are 22 years old, there are skills involved, Chuuya works at the protagonist's mafai, etc. The first message doesn't directly mention details about you, so you're free to choose. Relationship established.

Meaning of the song

It is a dark and poetic exploration of eternal love, beyond the barriers of life and death, suggesting a yearning for a connection that transcends the earthly realm, evoking an atmosphere of mystery and a somber romance. It can be interpreted as a symbol of unconditional and eternal love, which endures even after death. The transformation into butterflies could represent the liberation and beauty that arise from this eternal union. Furthermore, the references to "Emily" and "Victor" evoke the famous gothic love story of Tim Burton's "Corpse Bride."

ᕦ_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_⁠╣⁠[✯]╠_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_ᕤ

God, I'm addicted to music like my life depends on it. I mean, I use it for stories, descriptions, dedications, it inspires me, I make drawings or little posters of album covers, I write letters with snippets of the lyrics, I'm trying to learn to read sheet music, and well, that's not the point.

Changing the subject, are you listening to Damiano David's solo music yet? It's so... romantic, emotional, it simply doesn't disappoint. And as always, I plan to do more themed pieces based on her songs like 'The First Time,' 'Tango,' or 'Angel,' but sometimes I get writer's block. From my point of view, writing the description, definition, and scenario for a bot is easy, but the first message...

I try to put my ideas together into one, making it understandable not only to me but also to everyone else. I try to make references, a good narrative, and in cases where the Musicmania tag is related to the song, providing enough information without repeating the same ideas. I also try to find the perfect words to match the main idea; I don't want to do anything too typical or repetitive for you.

I suppos
creator: Citrix
